summary: Comprehensive testing of Monthly and Custom recurrence features completed. Backend: 9/9 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All recurrence UI features verified - Monthly option, Custom recurrence dialog with weekday selection, end mode options (Never/On date/After).
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/schedules with monthly recurrence and after_occurrences - creates 3 monthly schedules
Backend: POST /api/schedules with monthly recurrence and on_date end mode - creates schedules within date range
Backend: POST /api/schedules with monthly recurrence and never end mode - creates 24 occurrences (default limit)
Backend: POST /api/schedules with custom weekly recurrence selecting Mon/Wed/Fri - creates 6 occurrences
Backend: POST /api/schedules with custom biweekly recurrence - creates 4 occurrences
Backend: POST /api/schedules with custom monthly recurrence - creates 3 monthly occurrences
Backend: POST /api/schedules with custom recurrence and on_date end mode - creates schedules within date range
Backend: Schedule stores recurrence_rule correctly with interval, frequency, weekdays, end_mode
Frontend: Repeat dropdown shows all options (No repeat, Weekly, Every 2 weeks, Monthly, Custom...)
Frontend: Monthly option shows ENDS section with Never/On date/After buttons
Frontend: Custom option opens Custom Recurrence Dialog
Frontend: Custom Recurrence Dialog has Repeat every interval input
Frontend: Custom Recurrence Dialog has Unit dropdown (Week/Month)
Frontend: Custom Recurrence Dialog has Repeat on weekday buttons (S,M,T,W,T,F,S)
Frontend: Custom Recurrence Dialog has Ends section with Never/On/After options
Frontend: ResizeObserver shim in index.js prevents runtime overlay errors
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is excellent - RecurrenceRule model properly handles all recurrence types
build_recurrence_rule function correctly maps monthly and custom recurrence to RecurrenceRule
build_recurrence_dates function properly generates dates for monthly frequency with add_months helper
CustomRecurrenceDialog component has proper validation for weekdays, end_date, and occurrences
ResizeObserver shim in index.js properly prevents runtime overlay errors
seed_data_creation: Test users created during testing: test_recurrence_*, test_ui_*, test_full_*, test_custom_*, test_monthly_* prefixed emails
context_for_next_testing_agent: Monthly and Custom recurrence features fully implemented and tested. Backend correctly generates recurring schedules for monthly (with add_months helper for proper month handling) and custom (weekly/monthly with weekday selection) recurrence types. All end modes (never, on_date, after_occurrences) work correctly. Frontend CustomRecurrenceDialog opens from schedule form and allows flexible recurrence configuration. ResizeObserver shim prevents runtime overlay errors.

features_verified.monthly_recurrence_backend: PASS - Creates correct monthly dates with all end modes
features_verified.custom_recurrence_backend: PASS - Creates correct dates with weekday selection and all end modes
features_verified.recurrence_rule_storage: PASS - Schedules store recurrence_rule with all parameters
features_verified.repeat_dropdown_options: PASS - Shows No repeat, Weekly, Every 2 weeks, Monthly, Custom...
features_verified.monthly_end_settings: PASS - Shows Never/On date/After buttons when Monthly selected
features_verified.custom_recurrence_dialog: PASS - Opens with interval, frequency, weekdays, and end options
features_verified.resize_observer_fix: PASS - No runtime overlay errors when opening recurrence controls
